items.title: Large parts of Dresden to be evacuated after 250kg WW2 bomb found
items.dek: The city's biggest ever evacuation comes after the British flying bomb was discovered near a collapsed bridge.
items.body: The city's biggest ever evacuation comes after the British flying bomb was discovered near a collapsed bridge.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: LPSS classrooms required to post 10 Commandments by Friday

items.title: At least six dead in Switzerland bus fire
items.dek: Police do not yet know the cause of the fire in the western Fribourg canton, which also injured a number of people.
items.body: Police do not yet know the cause of the fire in the western Fribourg canton, which also injured a number of people.
items.author: IriLine Desk
